overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza at night, transitioning through a highway underpass and into a dark concrete corridor with vibrant pink neon installations. The scene features ray-traced reflections on wet pavement, holographic advertisements, and futuristic cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with neon benches and food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza past a food vendor and illuminated benches

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart under illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: street food cart with glowing warm light and umbrella
futuristic benches with cyan and pink neon lighting
large red neon sign reading BD SHACK on building facade
highly reflective wet ground surface mirroring neon lights

segments.scene_description: The sequence opens in a wide-open pedestrian plaza at night, with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. A food vendor cart with warm lighting stands to the left while illuminated benches glow with cyan and pink hues. The camera moves forward through the rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza toward distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass intersection with elevated roads

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive elevated highway structure overhead
returns to street level view showing vehicles and the 24/7 store entrance

agents.ego_description: looking up at the elevated highway structure then continuing forward past street-level shops

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass with purple illuminated underside
large floating digital advertisement with human face
convenience store with bright blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the massive elevated highway structure, tilting the camera up to reveal its scale and purple lighting. The scene transitions to street level where the 24/7 store becomes visible and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road. The environment shifts from open plaza to a semi-covered intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning to covered underpass

events.description: passing the 24/7 store entrance and approaching the underpass
entering darker underpass area with red ambient lighting replacing neon

agents.ego_description: walking past the convenience store toward the dark underpass entrance

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance with concrete walls and overhead red lights
massive support columns for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Moving along the commercial sidewalk past the 24/7 store, the environment gradually darkens as the character approaches the underpass entrance. The lighting shifts from bright neon to dim red ambient light, and concrete support pillars dominate the view as the street transitions into the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with red ambient lighting

events.description: entering the dark concrete underpass with red ambient ceiling lights
passing closely by a vendor cart with large umbrella on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass passing vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at cart with illuminated umbrella and scattered goods

entered.detail: street vendor cart with large beige umbrella and warm square light
dim red light strips running along the concrete ceiling
dark rough concrete walls with graffiti and industrial fixtures
illuminated billboards showing advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed underpass with dark concrete walls and dim red ambient lighting. A vendor cart with a large umbrella occupies the right side of the path. The environment feels industrial and gritty, with digital advertising screens providing the only bright light sources in the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vertical pink neon light installations

events.description: entering the vibrant corridor with vertical pink neon light pillars
crowd density increases with more pedestrians visible in the neon corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the pink neon corridor alongside other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall vertical strips of bright pink neon light lining the walkway
planters with trees surrounded by blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass into a vibrant corridor illuminated by vertical pink neon light strips. The space features illuminated tree planters with blue lighting and more pedestrians walking or sitting on benches. The atmosphere shifts from gritty industrial to stylish cyberpunk aesthetic with bright neon reflections on the wet floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-soaked neon plaza into a gritty industrial underpass that eventually opens into a stylish, pink-lit corridor. It begins by gliding through a pedestrian plaza where wet pavement reflects cyan and pink hues from glowing benches and a warm food vendor cart. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts beneath the massive scale of an elevated highway with purple lighting, transitioning from the open plaza to a semi-covered intersection near a 24/7 store. The scene then darkens as the camera passes concrete support pillars and enters a narrow, industrial underpass dominated by dim red ambient light and digital advertising screens. Finally, the camera emerges from the gritty concrete corridor into a vibrant space illuminated by vertical pink neon strips and blue-lit tree planters, returning to a polished cyberpunk aesthetic.
